messages.message:
Compilation Skipped: Existing memoization could not be preserved

React Compiler has skipped optimizing this component because the existing manual memoization could not be preserved. The inferred dependencies did not match the manually specified dependencies, which could cause the value to change more or less frequently than expected. The inferred dependency was `user`, but the source dependencies were [input, user?.id, isLoading, sendMessage]. Inferred less specific property than source.

C:\Users\hjun8\OneDrive\Desktop\SomeDay-FE\src\components\features\main\DiaryModal.tsx:36:34
  34 |
  35 |   // ─── 수정된 부분: sendMessage 호출 시 user.id 전달 ───
> 36 |   const handleSend = useCallback(async () => {
     |                                  ^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 37 |     const text = input.trim();
     | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 38 |     if (!text || !user?.id || isLoading) return;
     …
     | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 46 |     await sendMessage(text, user.id); //
     | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 47 |   }, [input, user?.id, isLoading, sendMessage]);
     | ^^^^ Could not preserve existing manual memoization
  48 |
  49 |   if (!isOpen) return null;
  50 |
Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.
